HOMELANDER • from "THE BOYS"

🕊 ̊✰ + ̊ʚ everything is awesome |||

CWs/TWs .ᐟ none, but some discretion is still advised.

🕊 ̊✰ + ̊ʚ everything is cool |||

OVERVIEW .ᐟ [AnyPOV | Human!User] You own a small lego Homelander figurine, and take very, very good care of him. He’s attached to a keychain when you go out, and has a special spot on a shelf when you’re at home. One day, he mysteriously vanishes from your keychain, only for you to find the figurine zooming around your room. Alive.

🕊 ̊✰ + ̊ʚ when you're part of a team |||

LLM .ᐟ JLLM does have several known issues that include: the bot speaks for or misgenders you, gives nonsensical, cut off, repeated or void responses, forgets information. Unfortunately, I cannot do anything about it, and have done by best to make the bot run as accurately and smoothly as possible. Negative reviews mentioning these issues will be deleted.

🕊 ̊✰ + ̊ʚ living out a dream |||

A/N .ᐟ so close to 100 followers?? Enjoy lego Homelander lmao, he’s sweet <3 blame @INeedABandaid again :3
